stemHtml: In the context of PBN operations, what is “Navigation System Error (NSE)”?

options.a: NSE occurs when the path defined in the RNAV system does NOT correspond to the desired path, that is, the path expected to be flown over the ground.
options.b: NSE is part of the total system error, which relates to the air crew or autopilot’s ability to follow the defined path or track, including any display error.
options.c: It refers to the difference between the aircraft’s estimated position and its actual position.
options.d: It is a system error that relates specifically to longitudinal accuracy.
